mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) AS booking_total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'VERIFIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS booking_verified_total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CANCELED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS booking_canceled_total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'VIOLATION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS booking_violation_total FROM booking_reservation WHERE start_time >= #{startTime} AND start_time < #{endTime}

SELECT DATE(br.start_time) AS date, COUNT(1) AS booking_total, SUM(CASE WHEN br.status = 'VERIFIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS verified_total, SUM(CASE WHEN br.status = 'CANCELED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS canceled_total, SUM(CASE WHEN br.status = 'VIOLATION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violation_total FROM booking_reservation br WHERE br.start_time >= #{startTime} AND br.start_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE(br.start_time) ORDER BY DATE(br.start_time) ASC

SELECT v.id AS venue_id, v.name AS venue_name, COUNT(1) AS booking_total, SUM(CASE WHEN br.status = 'VERIFIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS verified_total, SUM(CASE WHEN br.status = 'CANCELED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS canceled_total, SUM(CASE WHEN br.status = 'VIOLATION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violation_total FROM booking_reservation br JOIN venue v ON v.id = br.venue_id WHERE br.start_time >= #{startTime} AND br.start_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY v.id, v.name ORDER BY booking_total DESC LIMIT #{topN}
